seo.meta_description: Transparency and simplicity are at the heart of our booking process. Learn how to book your Mount Rinjani trekking package in 6 easy steps.

hero.title:
Easily Book and Secure
Your Trip in Just a Few
Steps
hero.subtitle: Transparency and simplicity are at the heart of our booking process. With clear steps and secure confirmation, you'll know exactly what to expect—every step of the way.

step1.title: Choose Your <1>Trekking Package</1>.
step1.desc1: Browse through our curated selection of Mount Rinjani trekking packages and choose the one that best fits your preferences, schedule, and fitness level. Explore our Rinjani tour packages <1>here</1>.
step1.desc2: After selecting your preferred route and duration, decide whether you'd like a <1>private package</1> or a <2>shared/group package</2>—this will affect the overall pricing and experience.
step1.desc3: If you're unsure which option suits you best, we recommend visiting our <1>Rinjani Trekking Price</1> page. There, you'll find:
step1.list1: A full comparison of private vs. group package benefits
step1.list2: Updated pricing details for each option
step1.list3: Key information that can help you make the right decision based on your travel style and budget
step1.desc4: Our team is also happy to assist you if you need further clarification

step2.title: <1>Contact Us</1> to Book and Confirm.
step2.desc1: Once you've selected your package, reach out to us to start the booking process. You can contact us via:
step2.desc2: Our team will guide you through the next steps to ensure a smooth reservation.

step3.title: Provide <1>Trekker Details</1>.
step3.desc1: To proceed with your booking, we will require some basic information for each participant:
step3.desc2: Alternatively, you may simply send us a clear photo of your passport for convenience.

step4.title: Pay the <1>Deposit</1>.
step4.desc1: To secure your seat and reserve your Rinjani trekking permit, a <1>deposit of USD $50 per person</1> is required.
step4.list1: Your trekking permit is officially reserved
step4.list2: Your seat is secured for your selected date
step4.desc3: Payment methods are outlined clearly on our <1>Payment Information</1> page—please refer to the section at the bottom of the page for full details.

step5.title: Booking <1>Confirmation</1>
step5.desc1: Once your deposit has been made, your booking is officially confirmed.
step5.list1: You may keep your <1>payment receipt or deposit screenshot</1> as proof of booking.
step5.list2: Your <1>chat or written correspondence</1> with us also serves as your booking confirmation record.
step5.desc2: This means you do not need any additional confirmation file. Simply keep these records safe for your reference.

step6.title: <1>Relax</1> and Get Ready!
step6.desc1: With everything confirmed, you can now sit back and look forward to your Rinjani adventure. Our team will handle the rest and keep you informed as your trekking date approaches.
